overall.description: A first-person perspective walkthrough in Cyberpunk 2077, moving along a high-rise rooftop terrace with futuristic architecture, then entering a luxury apartment bathroom through a large window. The scene features bright morning sunlight, sleek modern design, and a transition from outdoor urban environment to indoor residential space.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise rooftop walkway with glass railings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the elevated rooftop terrace toward the apartment building facade

entered.detail: illuminated signage on distant building reading ELEVEN PLAZA
dark paneled exterior with large reflective windows and red accent lighting
transparent glass barrier along the edge of the terrace overlooking the city
rectangular planters with small green shrubs arranged along the walkway
dark roof structure with integrated linear lighting running along the terrace

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along a high-rise rooftop terrace in a futuristic city, passing by glass railings with views of the skyline and approaching a modern apartment building. The area features wooden decking, overhead lighting, and planters, with the Eleven Plaza building visible in the distance.

events.description: passing through the large window from exterior terrace into the apartment bathroom interior

agents.ego_description: approaching the large window and seamlessly passing through the glass into the luxury apartment

entered.detail: white oval bathtub visible first through the window then from inside the bathroom
modern wall-mounted shower controls visible through the glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the large window of the apartment, revealing a white freestanding bathtub inside. At approximately 28 seconds, the perspective transitions through the window glass into the bathroom interior, leaving the exterior terrace and city views behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury apartment bathroom with city views

agents.ego_description: moving around the spacious bathroom interior, examining the bathtub, shower area, and elevator

entered.detail: metallic elevator door with green light indicator and control panel
floor-to-ceiling glass shower stall with modern fixtures
digital display screen mounted on the interior wall

segments.scene_description: Inside the luxury bathroom, the camera explores the modern interior featuring a freestanding bathtub on a raised wooden platform, a glass-enclosed shower, and a metallic elevator door. Sunlight streams through the floor-to-ceiling window as the camera moves deeper into the room, revealing wall-mounted fixtures and controls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an expansive futuristic rooftop terrace into the intimate interior of a luxury apartment. It begins by gliding along wooden decking and past glass railings, offering a wide view of the city skyline and the distant Eleven Plaza. As the camera approaches the building's facade, the perspective shifts toward a large window that reveals a white freestanding bathtub inside. The scene then transitions seamlessly through the glass, leaving the urban exterior behind to enter a bright, modern bathroom. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the room, passing a glass-enclosed shower and a metallic elevator door as sunlight streams through the floor-to-ceiling windows.
